entry.title: New IDC 70T04018D9CAP1035 awarded to SMITHS DETECTION INC. for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF INDEFINITE DELIVERY INDEFINITE QUANTITY (IDIQ) CONTRACT 70T04018D9CAP1035 IS TO PROVIDE PRODUCTION AND INSTALLATION OF MEDIUM SPEED EXPLOSIVE DETECTION SYSTEMS (MSEDS) TO SUPPORT THE MISSION OF THE TRANSPORTATION SECURITY ADMINISTRATION (TSA) AS DELIVERED BY THE ACQUISITION PROGRAM MANAGEMENT (APM) AND ADMINISTERED VIA THE ELECTRONIC BAGGAGE SCREENING PROGRAM (EBSP).

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: MISCELLANEOUS ALARM, SIGNAL, AND SECURITY DETECTION SYSTEMS

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:manufacturingOrganizationType.description: FOREIGN-OWNED BUSINESS NOT INCORPORATED IN THE U.S.

entry.title: IDC 70T04018D9CAP1035 (P00001) awarded to SMITHS DETECTION INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00001 TO INDEFINITE DELIVERY INDEFINITE QUANTITY CONTRACT 70T04018D9CAP1035 IS TO INCORPORATE AND UPDATE SEVERAL ITEMS IN THE CONTRACT.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:manufacturingOrganizationType.description: FOREIGN-OWNED BUSINESS NOT INCORPORATED IN THE U.S.

entry.title: IDC 70T04018D9CAP1035 (P00003) awarded to SMITHS DETECTION INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE IS AN ADMINISTRATIVE MODIFICATION TO CHANGE THE CONTRACTING OFFICER'S REPRESENTATIVE AND THE ALTERNATE COR. THIS MODIFICATION ALSO EXERCISE OPTION PERIOD 1 WITH A PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE FROM OCTOBER 1, 2019 TO SEPTEMBER 30, 2020.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: MISCELLANEOUS ALARM, SIGNAL, AND SECURITY DETECTION SYSTEMS

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:manufacturingOrganizationType.description: FOREIGN-OWNED BUSINESS NOT INCORPORATED IN THE U.S.

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION IS TO UPDATE SECTION I CLAUSES OF THE CONTRACT. ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS REMAIN THE SAME.

entry.title: IDC 70T04018D9CAP1035 (P00005) awarded to SMITHS DETECTION INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00005 TO (IDIQ) 70T04018D9CAP1035 IS TO UPDATE THE MULTIPLE SECTIONS OF THE IDIQ CONTRACT FOR CLARITY, UPDATE THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE, AND TO CORRECT THE ASSOCIATED VENDOR CAGE CODE WHICH WAS INADVERTENTLY CHANGED WITH MODIFICATION P00004.

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO EXTEND THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE FROM SEPTEMBER 30, 2023 TO SEPTEMBER 29, 2024.
